Gift Themes. Owners of collectible gifts can set dynamic chat wallpapers based on their unique gifts.

Telegram News
For all the features from this update, like upgrading gifts for other users and price statistics for collectible gifts – check out our blog:

August Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • More
Telegram
Music on Profiles, Stickers Mini App, New Profiles, and More
In today’s update, you can add music to your profile, choose a default profile tab, set unique chat themes based on your collectible gifts, help your friends upgrade their gifts — and more.

Comments and Reactions in Group Calls. Participants in group calls and video chats can now send comments and reactions directly in the call interface.

Notes for Contacts. When adding or editing a Telegram contact, you can now include a private note that is only visible to you.

1.93M views16:08

VIEW IN TELEGRAM
Threads and Streaming Responses for Bots. Bots now support separate threaded conversations and can stream responses – perfect for AI agents and large language models.

1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • More
2.26M views16:09
Telegram News
0:10
This media is not supported in your browser
VIEW IN TELEGRAM
New Profile Color Settings. Your profile appearance can now be quickly changed from the main Settings page.

Any of your collectible gifts can be used for your profile cover – while certain collections also unlock unique styles for links and replies.

October Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • More
2.76M views16:09
Telegram News
For all the features from this update, like Liquid Glass on iOS, improved gift interfaces and a new mini app for bug reports and feature suggestions – check out the full blog:

https://telegram.org/blog/comments-in-video-chats-threads-for-bots

October Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • More
Telegram
Comments in Group Calls, Notes for Contacts, Suggested Birthdays and More
In today's update we're launching live comments and reactions in group calls and video chats, notes for contacts, suggested birthdays, new ways to customize your profile colors — plus threaded chats and response streaming for AI bots, improvements for gifts…
3.47M views16:09

VIEW IN TELEGRAM
Live Stories. Every user can now host a live stream in their Telegram story, where viewers can send comments and donate Stars to support content creators.

Repeated Messages. Scheduled messages and reminders can now be set to repeat at intervals like every day or twice per month to help automate tasks and build habits.

November Features

2.06M views15:58
Telegram News
0:15
This media is not supported in your browser
VIEW IN TELEGRAM
Gift Auctions. New collections of Telegram Gifts are now released in an auction-based system to ensure fair distribution.

Stay tuned to @durov for details on upcoming auctions.

1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • More
2.09M views15:59

0:05

VIEW IN TELEGRAM
New Interface Designs. Telegram for Android has a new input field with satisfying blur effects you scroll. On iOS, more Liquid Glass interfaces have been added – like redesigned profiles and a new attachment menu.

For all the features from this update, like support for RTMP streaming in Stories and how to highlight your comments with Stars – check out the full blog:

November Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • More
Telegram
Live Stories, Repeated Messages, Auctions for Gifts and More
In today's update, you can start a stream with a live chat in your Telegram Story. We've also added repeating scheduled messages, an auction system for new gifts that ensures fair distribution -- and more.
2.96M views15:59

VIEW IN TELEGRAM
Passkeys. You can now create a passkey to instantly log in to Telegram with your PIN code or biometrics – instead of an SMS code.

1.9M views08:21
Telegram News
0:11
This media is not supported in your browser
VIEW IN TELEGRAM
Gift Purchase Offers. When viewing a gift, you can now make an offer to buy the gift with Stars or TON – keeping buyers and gift owners safe from scams.

December Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More
2.22M views08:21
Telegram News
Profile Audio in Stories. When posting a story, you can now quickly add audio from your profile playlist.

December Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More
Telegram
Passkeys, Gift Purchase Offers and More
In today's update, we add secure passkeys for instant login without SMS codes, gift purchase offers with built-in scam protection, and a simple way to add audio from your profile to stories.
2.88M views08:22
Telegram News
0:06
This media is not supported in your browser
VIEW IN TELEGRAM
AI Summaries. Long posts in channels can now be instantly summarized – and Instant View articles (like our blog) show an AI summary at the top.

These summaries use open-source AI models running on Cocoon – a decentralized network built by Telegram to maximize privacy.

VIEW IN TELEGRAM
Liquid Glass on iOS. The iOS app now fully supports Liquid Glass – with transparent elements and refraction effects throughout the app.

Happy New Year! Telegram released 13 major updates in 2025 – filled with innovative features like:
🎁 Collectible Gifts
📞 Secure Group Calls
📝 Checklists
📹 Live Stories
🔑 Passkeys

Telegram
AI Summaries, New Design and More
Telegram's first update of 2026 brings even more Liquid Glass interfaces on iOS and AI summaries for channel posts and Instant View pages — built to maximize privacy and protect user data.
